jsonLd.title: 91Springboard is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
91Springboard, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 91Springboard:
91Springboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 91Springboard!
